Container.Name: Nvidia-Status
Container.Overview: Comprehensive NVIDIA GPU dashboard and exporter for Unraid/Linux — including the GDDR6/GDDR6X VRAM-junction and hotspot temperatures that nvidia-smi HIDES on consumer RTX 30/40 cards (read straight off the GPU's PCIe BAR0). Provides a live web dashboard, a Prometheus /metrics endpoint, a JSON API, MQTT publishing with Home Assistant auto-discovery, and native InfluxDB (v1/v2) push for Grafana. Reports per-GPU temps + thresholds, clocks, power (with limits), utilisation, VRAM, PCIe gen/width + live upload/download bandwidth, fan, throttle reasons, per-process VRAM/encode/decode mapped to the owning DOCKER CONTAINER, and NVENC encode sessions with codec + resolution. Optional, gated power-limit control (per GPU, with a latch that re-applies on restart). Multi-GPU aware. Configure everything from the built-in Settings page or via the variables below. Requires the Unraid Nvidia-Driver plugin. SECURITY: reads GPU BAR0 via SYS_RAWIO + /dev/mem (needed for the hidden junction/VRAM temps). Per-process container names need --pid=host + --cgroupns=host + the read-only docker containers mount (all pre-set below). Power-limit control additionally requires Privileged=on.

Config.Name: Container names (ro)
Config.Description: Read-only mount so GPU processes can be mapped to container names

Config.Name: GPUs
Config.Description: Which GPUs to expose (all, or a UUID/index)

Config.Name: Mode
Config.Description: prometheus = web/HTTP server (normal). json = print JSON lines to the log instead.

Config.Name: Node name
Config.Description: Identifier used in MQTT topics, InfluxDB tags and the HA device name. Defaults to the hostname.

Config.Name: Enable MQTT
Config.Description: Publish to MQTT if a broker host is set below (1=on, 0=off)

Config.Name: Enable InfluxDB
Config.Description: Write to InfluxDB if a URL is set below (1=on, 0=off)

Config.Name: MQTT broker host
Config.Description: MQTT broker IP/host. Blank = MQTT off.

Config.Name: MQTT username
Config.Description: MQTT username (if the broker needs auth)

Config.Name: InfluxDB write interval (s)
Config.Description: How often to write to InfluxDB

Config.Name: InfluxDB token (v2)
Config.Description: v2 API token (presence selects the v2 API)

Config.Name: Enable power-limit control
Config.Description: Allow setting the GPU power limit from the Settings page. Also requires Privileged = ON (advanced view). Default 0 = read-only.

Config.Name: Power-limit min (clamp)
Config.Description: Optional lower clamp (watts). Blank = use the GPU's own minimum.

Config.Name: Power-limit max (clamp)
Config.Description: Optional upper clamp (watts). Blank = use the GPU's own maximum.
